log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 8 falling damage. HP: 170/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Dhampir — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 15] MISS.
Young Red Dragon attacks Dhampir — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 26 damage. Dhampir — Unarmored Caster HP: 41/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Dhampir — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Dhampir — Unarmored Caster HP: 22/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL! 7 psychic damage. HP: 163/178
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Dhampir — Unarmored Caster.
→ Dhampir — Unarmored Caster healed for 9 HP. HP: 31/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Dhampir — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Dhampir — Unarmored Caster HP: 13/67
→ Dhampir — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 5 vs DC 10]
Young Red Dragon attacks Dhampir — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 21 damage. Dhampir — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
